name: NNC Firm
message: NNC FirmNahwegahbow Corbiere originated in 1982. Our Firm acts exclusively for First Nation individuals, communities and organizations, and our practice is restricted to Aboriginal law. We provide general representation for First Nations in all matters related to governance, as well as specialized work in Aboriginal and Treaty Rights litigation and negotiation. We have a comprehensive network of highly qualified experts in archival research, anthropology, history, Aboriginal policy and other disciplines regionally, nationally and internationally. This ensures that we can take full advantage of research while keeping expenses within your budget.Geo: Canada - Leak size: 960 GB Archive - Contains: Files, SQL
